Operation 'createAnnouncement' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal. It lacks details about what inputs are expected (announcement content, recipients), what the response contains (ID, timestamp, status), and side effects (immediate visibility to recipients). Enhanced description provides AI agents with clear understanding of inputs, outputs, and operational effects.

data.current_description: Create a new announcement.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new announcement and broadcasts it to specified recipients or organization members. Accepts announcement content and distribution settings via the request body. Returns the created announcement object with its ID, creation timestamp, and status. The announcement becomes immediately visible to intended recipients.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks details about what inputs are expected (announcement content, recipients), what the response contains (ID, timestamp, status), and side effects (immediate visibility to recipients). Enhanced description provides AI agents with clear understanding of inputs, outputs, and operational effects.

message: Operation 'getAnnouncement' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description lacks detail about what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies that the response includes content, metadata, recipient info, and comments, helping AI agents understand the full scope of returned data.

data.current_description: Retrieve an announcement by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific announcement by its ID. Returns the complete announcement object including content, creation details, recipient information, and associated comments. Requires the announcement ID as a path parameter.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies that the response includes content, metadata, recipient info, and comments, helping AI agents understand the full scope of returned data.

message: Operation 'getInbox' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description mentions grouping but lacks clarity on filtering options, authentication requirements, and what constitutes inbox tasks. Enhanced version explains the purpose (unassigned/self-assigned work), filtering capabilities, and return structure to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns all inbox tasks, including tasks organized into groups.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all inbox tasks for the authenticated user, organized into logical groups. Accepts optional filtering parameters to scope results. Returns a collection of inbox task objects with their details, status, and group assignments. Inbox tasks represent unassigned or self-assigned work items requiring attention.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions grouping but lacks clarity on filtering options, authentication requirements, and what constitutes inbox tasks. Enhanced version explains the purpose (unassigned/self-assigned work), filtering capabilities, and return structure to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'diffCatalog' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Modify catalog items' is too generic and doesn't clarify the batch nature or specific operations. Description lacks detail about what inputs are expected, what the response contains, and how upsert works. Added clarity about batch operations, input structure, response schema, and upsert behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Modify catalog items via upsert and delete operations.
data.summary_suggestion: Batch update and delete catalog items
data.description_suggestion: Performs batch modifications to catalog items using upsert and delete operations. Accepts a list of items to create or update and items to delete. Returns a CatalogSyncResponse containing the results of all operations, including created, updated, and deleted items. Upsert operations create new items or update existing ones based on item identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Modify catalog items' is too generic and doesn't clarify the batch nature or specific operations. Description lacks detail about what inputs are expected, what the response contains, and how upsert works. Added clarity about batch operations, input structure, response schema, and upsert behavior for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'listMembers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is too vague about what information is returned. Added clarity about the response structure (array of Member objects) and what fields are included (user information, roles, permissions, profile details) to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

data.current_description: Returns a list of all participants of the organization.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all members in the organization. Returns an array of Member objects containing user information, roles, permissions, and profile details for each organization participant.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is too vague about what information is returned. Added clarity about the response structure (array of Member objects) and what fields are included (user information, roles, permissions, profile details) to help AI agents understand the operation's output.

message: Operation 'createMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about what inputs are required and what the response contains. Added information about the request schema (CreateMemberRequest), example fields (email, name, role, permissions), and response structure (Member object with ID and profile) for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Add a user to the organization.
data.description_suggestion: Adds a new user to the organization. Accepts a CreateMemberRequest containing user details such as email, name, role, and permissions. Returns a Member object representing the newly created organization member with assigned ID and profile information.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about what inputs are required and what the response contains. Added information about the request schema (CreateMemberRequest), example fields (email, name, role, permissions), and response structure (Member object with ID and profile) for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description uses 'employee' terminology which is inconsistent with the API's 'member' terminology. Description also lacks clarity about what specific fields are returned. Updated to use consistent 'member' terminology and clarified the response structure and included fields.

data.current_description: Retrieve employee information and profile details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific organization member by ID. Returns a Member object containing user profile data, contact information, role, permissions, and organizational details.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description uses 'employee' terminology which is inconsistent with the API's 'member' terminology. Description also lacks clarity about what specific fields are returned. Updated to use consistent 'member' terminology and clarified the response structure and included fields.

message: Operation 'getTask' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description mentions task types but lacks clarity about what is returned. Added explicit mention of TaskResponse schema, what data is included (status, assignments, comments), and clarified that both task types are supported for better AI agent understanding of response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve a simple or form task with all comments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a task by its ID, including all associated comments. Returns a TaskResponse object containing task details, status, assignments, and comment history. Supports both simple tasks and form-based tasks.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions task types but lacks clarity about what is returned. Added explicit mention of TaskResponse schema, what data is included (status, assignments, comments), and clarified that both task types are supported for better AI agent understanding of response structure.

message: Operation 'deleteTask' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal.
